NASDAQ: EXOZ

AI-Enhanced
Biomanufacturing
at Commercial Scale

eXoZymes is the market leader of next-generation biomanufacturing, making highly valuable, natural-inspired products and molecules, in quality, purity, and at a scale, that no one else can. eXoZymes uses AI-enhanced, cell-free enzyme technology to produce unique products. The core idea is simple but powerful: nature makes extraordinary molecules — but only in trace amounts, locked inside complex biological systems of cells. eXoZymes figured out how to replicate those same molecules at industrial scale, with engineering-level precision, by working entirely outside the living cell. The result is a scalable platform with durable IP, capital-light growth, and asymmetric upside across pharmaceutical, wellness and industrial markets.

Learn more from eXoZymes CEO Michael Heltzen and Chief Commercial Officer Damien Perriman on upcoming Investor Zoom calls as they walk you through the platform and flagship product programs — each targeting hundred-billion-dollar-plus total addressable markets — and why the timing for eXoZymes is right now.

How to Participate

Two parallel paths to securing your position in the eXoZymes offering. Both can be initiated immediately.

Submit Indication of Interest
A non-binding IOI signals your intent to participate and ensures you receive offering documents, allocation updates, and priority access as the deal progresses toward close.
1Complete the IOI form with your name, entity, and intended investment amount.
2An MDB Capital representative will confirm your accredited investor status.
3You will receive the S-1 and subscription documents upon availability.
Submit IOI →

Have questions about this offering or need guidance before submitting? Reach an MDB Capital representative directly.

📅 Schedule a Call with MDB ✉️ Email Us
Open an MDB Direct Account
Participation in public venture offerings requires a brokerage account with MDB Capital. Opening an account gives you direct access to all public venture transactions on the platform.
1Complete the online account application — approximately 10 minutes.
2Complete identity verification and accredited investor certification.
3Once approved, fund your account and subscribe via the offering portal.
Open Account →

Questions about opening or funding your MDB Direct account? Our operations team is here to help.

📞 Call MDB Ops ✉️ Email MDB Ops Team

Investor Resources

Video updates and interviews from the eXoZymes management team.

▶ Video · Investor Update
Nasdaq: Damien Perriman interview on NCT
CCO at eXoZymes, Damien Perriman, interviewed at Nasdaq around our NCT project: "We've shown that we can go from idea to 100× pilot scale in 12 months — and hit it right the first time."
2026 · exozymes.com
▶ Video · Investor Update
Video interview: Successful pilot scale run with Cayman Chemical validates eXoZymes' technology and scalability
Using eXoZymes' tech transfer package, Cayman Chemical advanced the protocol from a one-liter setup to a 100-liter pilot run, operating the reaction, downstream processing, and analysis independently.
March 18, 2026 · exozymes.com
▶ Video · Investor Update
Nasdaq: Michael B. Spector interviews CEO Heltzen
As part of Nasdaq's 'Amplify Spotlight' series, CEO of eXoZymes, Michael Heltzen, recently sat down with Michael B. Spector from Nasdaq for an in-depth interview.
2026 · exozymes.com

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions from prospective investors. Contact your MDB Capital representative for questions not addressed below.

U.S. investors with a brokerage account may be eligible to participate in eXoZymes' public offering, as EXOZ trades publicly on NASDAQ. Non-U.S. investors may also be able to participate, subject to the securities laws and regulations applicable in their jurisdiction. Investors who wish to participate through MDB Direct may open a brokerage account at mdb.com.
There is no minimum investment amount for this offering. Participation is subject to the terms of the offering and the policies and procedures of the brokerage firm through which an investor places an order.
No. To participate in this offering, you must hold a brokerage account with MDB Capital or one of the selected selling group brokerages (NAMES HERE – link to websites also). For more information on opening an MDB Direct account CLICK HERE.
Investor presentations are scheduled for April 14–22, 2026. We expect to close the offering on or before May 15, 2026. The timeline is subject to market conditions. Contact MDB Capital for further information.
Yes. A webinar replay will be made available via email to those who registered and a copy will be posted to this landing page.
About eXoZymes
eXoZymes, Inc. is an AI-enabled biomanufacturing company headquartered in Monrovia, CA, developing cell-free enzyme platforms for pharmaceutical and nutraceutical applications.
